branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Cove & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Giants pride

columnists.name: Harlan Forsythe
columnists.backstory: A Sunset District lifer who covered Candlestick, AT&T, and now Oracle Park with the same measured cadence.
columnists.voice_sample: Chapman went 2-for-4, Webb went seven, and the Giants took the series from the Rockies. Record evens at 10-10.

columnists.name: Fiona Delgado-Chen
columnists.backstory: A Mission District coffee roaster who believes the even-year magic is dormant but not dead and writes her columns on receipt paper.
columnists.voice_sample: One-run losses build character. By June this club is playing the kind of late-inning baseball that buys you three rings in five years.

columnists.name: Bud Petrowski
columnists.backstory: A North Beach retiree who refused to forgive the Giants for letting Buster Posey retire and writes columns like he's filing a grievance.
columnists.voice_sample: We signed who? To play where? Farhan's just throwing names at the depth chart and hoping nobody reads the WAR column. I read it.
